answer: On September 15, 2026, Florida purchase closings for FNF National Title had an overstated escrow disbursement reconciliation variance because `settlement_disbursement_recon_v3` joined `party.party_identity_bridge` on `normalized_tax_id`. That key can repeat across buyer and seller roles within the same closing, so it duplicated disbursements in `finance.disbursement_recon_daily`. The transform should use `closing_party_role_id` instead.

facts.affected_segment: florida purchase closings for fnf national title
facts.remediation: switch the transform to closing_party_role_id, quarantine normalized_tax_id joins, and backfill florida purchase closings
